news.summary: Peckshield flagged that the Verus-Ethereum bridge has been drained for 103.6 tBTC, 1,625 ETH, and 147,000 USDC.

news.title: Launched my own token on SUI today, based on an app I built that won DEV3PACK Best App in Colombia
news.summary:
Griffin is an adversarial security platform for AI agents. The core idea is simple but powerful, instead of just claiming your AI agent is secure, Griffin actually attacks it to prove otherwise.
Five autonomous attackers run in parallel against a target agent, each probing a different vulnerability:
• Prompt injection
• Social engineering
• Context poisoning
• Capability exploitation
• Encoding-based filter bypass

news.title: Invested 10k in Bitcoin in 2017 via my relative but now I’m unable to get the portfolio details. He is saying Zebpay froze his account.
news.summary:
So I invested 10k in 2017 via my relative as I was not well versed with crypto and trusted him. The investment was done via Zebpay using his mobile no and email. Did some follow up in middle but was told that there is not much gains.

I felt something fishy and wanted to see the portfolio now but the guy is saying his old bank account got inactive and KYC is not working in Zebpay.
